title: Sous-Drummiens
description: A rich, crunchy Uruguayan dish featuring Chinese long beans prepared with sous-vide and egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Chinese long beans
ingredients.notes: use fresh, pickling may reduce quantity

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 120°F (49°C). Pat the long beans dry and place them in a sealable bag.
Combine soy sauce, minced garlic, and salt into another sealable bag. Place the bean bag inside and vacuum-seal it tightly for sous-viding.
Sous-vide the prepared beans for 2 hours at 120°F (49°C).
Once cooled, remove the beans from the water bath and pat them dry with a clean kitchen towel.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
Gently toss the sous-vided beans with the heated garlic oil to coat evenly. Serve hot as a main course.
Optional: garnish with additional fresh herbs if desired.
